name: chart-radar-legend
visual_summary: A radar chart legend is a graphical representation of a radar chart component, displaying a legend with labels and markers to help users interpret the data. It is often used in dashboards and data visualization applications where multiple radar charts are displayed. Developers would use this component when creating complex data visualizations with radar charts.
generation_prompt:
